text:
(In reply to feh from comment #4)

>finally, there is a pattern: The crash happens moving objects (files) by means of Gnome's  nemo on the desktop (copy/move files).
Unfortunately (or fortunately?), I can't cause a crash this way (using x11-fm/nemo). I'm using Xfce and compiling ports with poudriere if that matters.
